name: Drumcode
submission_requirements: No public demo channel; managed by Adam Beyer. Reach via relationship/established A&R only.
why: Scene-defining techno institution (est. 1996). A long game, not a cold target.

name: Experts Only
submission_requirements: Submit via the Trackstack portal linked from expertsonlyrecs.com DISCREPANCY: spec lists needs-warm-intro, but a public 'Send Demo' Trackstack portal is live on the official site — effectively cold-demo-friendly.
why: John Summit's label — peak of the current scene.

name: Black Book
submission_requirements: Send up to 5 tracks via the on-site Trackstack portal DISCREPANCY: spec lists needs-warm-intro, but a public demo-submission portal (Trackstack) is live on blackbookrecs.com.
why: Chris Lake's label — a Beatport #1 machine.

name: Catch & Release
submission_requirements: Send up to 5 tracks via the Trackstack portal on followthefishtv.com (the DEMOS page) DISCREPANCY: spec lists needs-warm-intro, but a public Trackstack demo portal is live.
why: Fisher's label — massive reach and chart dominance.

name: Repopulate Mars
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud or Dropbox links ONLY (no Google Drive / WeTransfer). Max 4 demos at once; use a private playlist for multiple. Turn downloads ON. Prefer extended/full mixes over radio edits One submission covers Repopulate Mars, South Of Saturn, and North Of Neptune.
why: Where Mau P broke through. Openly accepts demos.

name: Dirtybird
submission_requirements: Upload via the Label-Worx 'DIRTYBIRD DemoBox' page. No feedback offered on all demos; they contact you if signing Official demo channel is the Label-Worx DemoBox portal.
why: Fun, quirky lane; a known career-launcher.

name: Hellbent
submission_requirements: NEEDS VERIFICATION: no public demo portal found on hellbentrecs.com (a Shopify store) as of 2026-06-01. Past 'first release' contests referenced on Reddit. Check Cloonee's socials / a LabelRadar or Trackstack portal before recording a channel.
why: Cloonee's label — built for unknowns; charts constantly.

name: Three Six Zero
submission_requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal General/management contacts info@threesixzero.com and hi@threesixzero.com exist but are NOT demo channels — use the LabelRadar portal for demos.
why: Open submissions; growing fast (Dom Dolla's home).

name: Hot Creations
submission_requirements: Upload track privately to SoundCloud with downloads and comments enabled. Include name and contact details in description Claimed URL was soundcloud.com/hotcreationsdemos; allhcdemos is the current consolidated demos account for Hot Creations, Emerald City, and Hottrax per SoundCloud profile description.
why: Jamie Jones's label — deep scene credibility.

name: Solid Grooves
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only Claimed email confirmed on labelsbase.net and corroborated by findmylabels.com. Official site solidgrooves.co.uk has no public demo page.
why: UK tech house institution (est. 2015, London).

name: Sola
submission_requirements: Old sola-demos@outlook.com address (Facebook post ~2017) is stale; demos@solarecords.com confirmed by labelsbase.net and findmylabels.com.
why: Solardo's label (Manchester, UK) — consistent charting; email demos welcome.

name: Toolroom
submission_requirements: Upload via the on-site portal (powered by LabelRadar). They listen to everything but cannot reply to each; contact you if interested Role emails on the contact page (events/licensing/PR/store) are NOT demo channels.
why: Solid distribution and a long track record (Mark Knight).

name: Defected
submission_requirements: Streamable links only. WAV format only. Do NOT include artwork or promo materials. Submissions not following the guidelines are auto-deleted A LabelRadar portal also exists, but the official site directs demos to email.
why: Huge catalogue; one submission effectively covers ~11 sub-labels.

name: Knee Deep In Sound
submission_requirements: Licensing/management is craig@anglomanagement.co.uk — demos go to demos@hotsince82.com.
why: Hot Since 82's label — a less-competitive melodic lane.

name: Suara
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only. No sendspace / yousendit / wetransfer links Official contact page lists labelmanagement@suara-music.com as the sole contact. An older Twitter post (2015) references demos@suara-music.com but that is not the address on the current official /contact page. Corrected to official address.
why: Coyu's label — darker tech house niche.

name: Club Sweat
submission_requirements: Submit via the Sweat It Out DropTrack portal Portal covers Sweat It Out releases including Club Sweat.
why: Sweat It Out's house imprint — Australian reach; good for emerging artists.

name: Space Yacht
submission_requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal. Also: tracks reviewed live on twitch.tv/spaceyacht and on the 'Tune Reactor' on-air reaction series Both an always-open LabelRadar portal and the live Twitch review window exist.
why: Reviews demos live on Twitch — the most transparent route in the scene.

name: Glasgow Underground
submission_requirements: Send the right music to the right place (see Kevin McKay's '7 tips for sending a demo') Label publishes explicit demo guidance via Kevin McKay.
why: Kevin McKay's label — prolific Beatport charting and famously open/responsive to demos.

name: Snatch! Records
submission_requirements: WeTransfer, Dropbox, or SoundCloud link with download enabled. exclusive hold for 2 weeks while under review Claimed method was 'email' but official site uses a contact form (select 'Demos' from dropdown). The email demos@snatchrecords.com is listed on labelsbase as A&R contact and confirmed consistent with official site instructions. Method corrected to 'form'.
why: Riva Starr's label — consistent tech house charting and a known route for new producers.

name: Crosstown Rebels
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links preferred Demo email confirmed on label's own info/contact page at crosstownrebels.com/info/
why: Damian Lazarus's influential underground label — deep scene credibility (Get Lost / Day Zero).

name: Saved Records
submission_requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why: Nic Fanciulli's label — strong tech house pedigree and booking reach.

name: Moon Harbour
submission_requirements: Submit via the Trackstack portal (or the demo email) Both a Trackstack portal and a demo email are published.
why: Long-running Leipzig tech house institution (since 2000) with steady Beatport presence.

name: Desert Hearts
submission_requirements: Submit via the Trackstack portal
why: Beloved US house/techno collective and festival brand — 'House, Techno & Love'.

name: Box of Cats
submission_requirements: Submit via the on-site form / Trackstack (artist name, full name, email, track title, SoundCloud link) Migrated demo submissions to Trackstack.
why: Demo-friendly bass/tech house imprint that actively breaks new artists.

name: Cuttin' Headz
why: The Martinez Brothers' label — explicitly 'always on the lookout for new talent'.

name: Country Club Disco
submission_requirements: Submit when the demo form is open (e.g. the 'Caddyshack' Tech/Bass House window) NEEDS VERIFICATION of the current live form link; submission windows open periodically.
why: Golf Clap's demo-friendly label; runs a recurring 'Demo Tapes' series for unknowns.

name: Anjunadeep
submission_requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal Artists occasionally report the portal link going down — re-check before relying on it.
why: Globally prominent melodic/progressive house label (Anjuna / Above & Beyond family).

name: Confession
submission_requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal (demo email also published)
why: Tchami's label (Paris, 2015) — a leading future/bass house brand.

name: Higher Ground
submission_requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal
why: Diplo's house label — high-profile and growing, with major booking/streaming reach.

name: Night Bass
submission_requirements: NEEDS VERIFICATION: only a general contact (info@nightbassrecords.com) was found; dedicated demo channel not confirmed.
why: AC Slater's label — the defining home of bass house.

name: Diynamic
submission_requirements: 320kbps MP3. Do not send more than 3 tracks at once. Promos go to solomunpromo@diynamic.com (not demos)
why: Solomun's label — one of the most prestigious melodic/tech house brands, with major booking and streaming reach.

name: Get Physical
submission_requirements: Demo submissions ONLY via the LabelRadar portal
why: Three-decade Berlin house/tech house institution with deep catalogue and scene respect.

name: Rekids
submission_requirements: Send new, ideally sample-free music Demo address confirmed via the label's official channel.
why: Radio Slave's respected UK label (since 2006) — strong underground techno/house credibility.

name: Yoshitoshi Recordings
submission_requirements: Demo email demos@yoshitoshi.com (a Label-Worx form is also referenced) General: info@yoshitoshi.com (not demos).
why: Long-running, highly respected house/tech house label (Deep Dish) with global reach.

name: Lost Records
submission_requirements: SoundCloud links ONLY
why: CamelPhat's label — a fast-rising melodic/tech house brand with big chart presence.

name: All Day I Dream
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only alldayidream.com does not publish a public demo page; email confirmed by two independent secondary sources.
why: Lee Burridge's label — the defining organic/melodic house brand and event series.

name: Under No Illusion
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only ki@undernoillusionrecordings.com confirmed on labelsbase.net. Label also lists jamie@undernoillusionrecordings.com. Active through 2025/2026 (ADE 2025, Miami 2026 Night compilations).
why: Eli Brown's label — one of the hottest current tech house/techno crossover names.

name: Roush Label
submission_requirements: Submit up to 5 tracks via the on-site demo portal (15-day window)
why: Consistent tech house imprint with reliable Beatport presence; openly demo-friendly.

name: Abode Records
submission_requirements: Submit via the ABODE Records Trackstack portal Trackstack portal confirmed via multiple search sources. Claimed URL was null — corrected to Trackstack link.
why: Strong UK tech house party brand and label; actively solicits demos.

name: Eastenderz
submission_requirements: Bookings: bookings@futureartists.agency; management: aytek@eastenddubs.co.uk (not demos).
why: East End Dubs' label — a leader in the minimal/tech house ('minimal dub') wave.

name: PIV Records
submission_requirements: Submit via the LabelRadar portal General: info@pivrecords.com (not demos).
why: Amsterdam tech/deep house label (since 2014) with a distinctive, well-regarded sound.

name: Heldeep
submission_requirements: Drop an MP3 via the LabelRadar 'Drop Your Demo' portal
why: Oliver Heldens' label — high-profile, with major streaming and festival reach.

name: Perfect Havoc
submission_requirements: Upload via the on-site portal. They listen to everything but cannot reply to each Also on LabelRadar (labelradar.com/labels/PerfectHavoc/portal).
why: UK house/dance-pop label with a track record of breaking new artists (e.g. Joel Corry).

name: Nervous Records
submission_requirements: Check the label site for current submission guidelines before sending Official nervousnyc.com/about/ lists Trackstack portal (https://tstack.app/nervousrecords) as primary demo submission channel and Andrew@nervousnyc.com for A&R & Licensing. Claimed email info@nervousnyc.com is the general/generic contact, not the demo email. Corrected method to form and updated email to the A&R contact.
why: Iconic NYC house institution (since 1991) — deep heritage and ongoing releases.

name: Hottrax
submission_requirements: Upload track privately to SoundCloud with downloads and comments enabled. include name and contact details in track description The claimed soundcloud.com/groups/hot-creations-demo URL is dead — SoundCloud removed Groups in August 2016. Current submission channel is via the SoundCloud account soundcloud.com/allhcdemos (Hot Creations/Emerald City/Hottrax demos). Label Manager contact: leon@hotcreations.com. URL corrected.
why: Jamie Jones' more club-focused label (sister to Hot Creations) — actively scouts producers.

name: MoBlack Records
submission_requirements: Send private SoundCloud links only. No file attachments Confirmed on labelsbase.net and moblack.com/auto-draft contact page. Also promo@moblack.com for promos.
why: Consistently #1–2 top-selling label in Beatport's Afro House genre. Founded 2013 by Italian-Ghanaian producer MoBlack, it is the defining imprint of modern afro house globally, with hundreds of releases and a verified open demo email. High streaming credibility, strong booking impact, and openly accessible to unknowns.

name: Stay True Sounds
submission_requirements: Use private SoundCloud links for email route. LabelRadar portal for streamlined submission LabelRadar portal confirmed active (TikTok announcement + Defected/LabelRadar partnership news 2023). Email confirmed on labelsbase.net. Both routes open.
why: South African deep/afro house label co-founded by Kid Fonque and Jullian Gomes; acquired by Defected Records. Has LabelRadar portal AND an email route, both publicly accessible. Defected partnership gives global streaming and retail reach. Accessible to unknown artists through both channels.

name: Sondela Recordings
submission_requirements: Demo email confirmed directly in footer of sondelarecordings.com. Also info@sondelarecordings.com for general queries.
why: Defected's dedicated afro house imprint, launched 2021. Active Boiler Room partnerships, continuous 2024–2026 releases (Sondela Sampler series). Strong global streaming reach under Defected umbrella. Dedicated demo email confirmed on their own website.

name: Madorasindahouse
submission_requirements: Confirmed at madorasindahouse.com/contact. Additional A&R contacts: harrys@madorasindahouse.com, alkis@madorasindahouse.com.
why: Greece's leading afro house label and party brand; 10+ years running events across Europe and Africa. Strong Beatportal presence. Dedicated demo emails confirmed on their own contact page. Scene respect high in European afro house circuit, accessible to unknown artists.

name: Offering Recordings
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only Official site returned 503; email supported by labelsbase.net and RA listing
why: Founded 2007 by Congolese-Portuguese producer Boddhi Satva, a pioneer of 'ancestral soul' — spiritual afro house. Very active in 2024–2025 with multiple releases monthly. Beatport and Traxsource presence strong. Open demo email confirmed on labelsbase.net; consistent releases show active A&R.

name: Set About
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only Confirmed on labelsbase.net. Also listed as demo@set-about.com (secondary). Use demo@setaboutmusic.com as primary.
why: Boutique tech house label with afro-infused sensibility (Beatport label ID 54025). Active release schedule. Confirmed demo email on labelsbase.net with SoundCloud link requirement. Accessible to unknown artists; demo process clearly articulated.

name: LouLou Records
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only A&R email confirmed on labelsbase.net as kolombo@loulourecords.com. General contact also at info@loulourecords.com.
why: Belgian label founded by LouLou Players with strong Latin/Brazilian tech house flavor. 116 tech house releases on Beatport, active 2024–2025 (Summer Sampler 2025, Best Of 2024/2025 compilations). Accessible via email with SoundCloud link. Kolombo handles A&R; label friendly to new talent.

name: Tribe Records
submission_requirements: info@triberecordsuk.com is listed on the official triberecordsuk.com contact page as the general enquiries address; no dedicated demo email published. Label is active with releases through 2025.
why: Boutique London label founded by Zepherin Saint — a key figure in afro house history. 37 Beatport afro house releases, active 2024–2025 (confirmed via Beatport year range). Soul, afro and jazz at its core. General enquiries email confirmed on their own website. Accessible to unknown artists.

name: Afroterraneo Music
submission_requirements: No public demo email found on official channels. Label active through 2025 (multiple Kiko Navarro releases). Bandcamp contact form is only publicly available submission method found.
why: Label founded by Mallorcan DJ Kiko Navarro blending African rhythms with Mediterranean/Balearic vibes. Very active in 2025–2026 on Beatport (multiple monthly releases). Strong Afro House/Afro Latin presence. Contact via Bandcamp form confirmed; no dedicated demo email found on official site.

name: Cacao Records
submission_requirements: No public demo email found. Bandcamp contact form available. Label active as of 2025 (Best Of Cacao 2025 compilation).
why: Berlin-based Central American label with 127 Beatport afro house releases. Active in 2024–2026 (Best Of 2024, Best Of 2025 compilations). Key artists include David Mayer and Re.you. Strong afro/latin house flavor that fits the slice. Bandcamp contact form is the confirmed public channel.

name: Sccucci Manucci
submission_requirements: Do NOT send messages via SoundCloud inbox Label is active (release in May 2026). info@sccuccimanucci.com is their general/demo contact email; no separate demos@ address found. Multiple secondary sources agree.
why: London-based boutique label with long-running afro/house credibility; active in 2026 (VRRS 'Chtapodi' May 2026). Beatport and Traxsource presence. Known in the scene for eclectic, quality-focused curation. Demo contact confirmed via multiple sources.

name: Watergate Records
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only. High production quality expected Email confirmed on labelsbase.net. Label is prestigious — unknown artists without existing profile should expect low response rate. A warm introduction via an artist already on the label significantly improves chances.
why: Berlin club-label with elite reputation; 25 afro house releases on Beatport, active in 2024–2025. Releases afro house alongside melodic/deep house and techno. Demonstrated demo email published on labelsbase.net; however, given its prestige (Berlin club imprint), unknown artists face a high quality bar. Warm intro strongly advised, though email is technically public.

name: Vatos Locos
submission_requirements: No public demo email or form found. Best approach is Instagram DM (@vatos.locos.official) or SoundCloud. labelsbase.net had no page for this label. Confidence low — unverified channel.
why: Barcelona-based label by DJ Hector with strong Latin/afro-inflected tech house releases on Beatport. Scene respect is high in the tech house circuit. No publicly confirmed demo email found — social channels (Instagram @vatos.locos.official, SoundCloud) are the only accessible contact points. Likely needs a warm introduction or direct DM with strong music.

name: Hood Politics Records
submission_requirements: Official site links to tstack.app/hoodpoliticsrecords for submissions. Email is listed as alternative channel on labelsbase.net. Label states A&R team is relentlessly active.
why: San Diego–based collective (also described as Chicago-rooted) with strong Beatport presence across bass house, tech house and house. Actively releasing in 2024 (e.g. 'Pretty Boy Swag' by Proppa, Dec 2024; 'Six Five Four' by Shifty, Sept 2024). Known for community-driven curation and open to unknown artists via a stated always-on A&R policy. Scenes respect + streaming credibility well established.

name: House of Hustle
submission_requirements: private SoundCloud links only Listed on LabelRadar (labelradar.com/labels/HouseOfHustleLabel/profile). Email sourced from labelsbase.net.
why: Boutique dance label founded 2014 with a strong Beatport catalog (640+ tech house tracks, 59+ bass house). Dedicated 'attitude' aesthetic across big basslines, 808s and party-focused club music. Active on Beatport through 2024-2025. Listed on LabelRadar, confirming they actively use the platform to manage demo intake. Well-suited to an unknown artist with polished tech/bass house material.

name: Dim Mak Records
submission_requirements: private SoundCloud links only Official demos page at dimmak.com/demos confirmed; also on LabelRadar (labelradar.com/labels/dimmak/profile). Email and SoundCloud-link requirement confirmed via labelsbase.net.
why: Independent LA label founded by Steve Aoki in 1996. Has a dedicated /demos page and official email; maintains LabelRadar portal. Active 2024-2025 across bass house and tech house (e.g., Rich DietZ 'House Music & Anime' 2025). Known for 'New Noise' imprint discovering emerging talent. Beatport presence is strong and genre scope includes house and bass-adjacent. Accessible to unknown artists per their own stated 'by any means necessary' ethos.

name: Bunny Tiger
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only Confirmed via labelsbase which cites official Instagram as source.
why: Founded 2012 by Sharam Jey with a 'DJ tools for DJs' philosophy. Active through 2024-2025 on Beatport (91+ tech house, 8+ bass house releases). Consistent label with scene respect and a roster of international underground talent. Beatport, Traxsource and RA profiles all active. Contact email is public and the requirement for private SoundCloud links indicates they actively manage demo intake.

name: REALM Records
submission_requirements: Email confirmed via Gorgon City Facebook post (realmrecordsdemos@gmail.com also referenced in 2021 post). Primary demo email demos@realm-records.com and tstack URL from findmylabels.com. Also on LabelRadar (labelradar.com/labels/therealm/portal).
why: Founded 2018 by Gorgon City. Active and growing in 2024-2025 (album 'Reverie' via REALM & Astralwerks 2024; Beatport imprint presence confirmed via ADE 2024 chart). Strong streaming credibility and scene respect (Gorgon City are booking-relevant headline acts). Accepts demos via public email and tstack portal per confirmed official channels. Genres include house and tech house which crossover well with US-leaning bass house producers.

name: IN/ROTATION (Insomniac Records)
submission_requirements: Submit via the Insomniac Records LabelRadar portal; covers IN/ROTATION and other Insomniac imprints. Genres accepted: Deep House, Tech House, House, Melodic Techno, Progressive House, Techno per findmylabels.com.
why: Insomniac's dedicated house/tech-house imprint since 2017. 'Rotate' compilation series runs into Vol. 15+ (2025), demonstrating sustained commissioning activity. Parent company Insomniac runs major US festivals (EDC, HARD) — label exposure translates directly to booking visibility. LabelRadar portal is the confirmed submission channel (labelradar.com/labels/insomniac/portal), one of the strongest cold-submit platforms in the industry. Actively accepting house, tech house, deep house, melodic techno.

name: Stress Records
submission_requirements: Demo email confirmed directly on the official stress-records.com/contact/ page. Discord community at discord.com/invite/sErhkswXbR. Label is active with releases through April 2026.
why: Long-running UK-based house label run by Needwant Limited (also behind Future Disco). Very active through 2025-2026 (multiple Club Culture volumes; April 2026 releases confirmed on Bandcamp). Beatport and Beatsource presence strong. Known for artists like Ben Hemsley, Friend Within, Emily Nash. Has a Discord community for fans and the demo email is publicly listed on the official contact page — good accessibility signal.

name: Sleazy Deep
submission_requirements: Email sourced from SoundCloud profile bio and secondary source confirmation. Label also operates Sleazy G sub-imprint for G-house. Rob Made Linktree at linktr.ee/robmade.
why: London-based collective founded 2011 by Rob Made. Nu skool disco, deep house funk and ultra-modern sonics — crossover appeal for US bass/house producers. Confirmed active in 2024: 'Everything Changes EP' released May 10 2024; 'CLUBTRAXX Vol 1' released April 12 2024 (both confirmed on Bandcamp). Beatport chart positions and Mixmag support documented. Sub-label Sleazy G features G-house artists including Amine Edge & DANCE and Shiba San, directly relevant to the bass-house crossover target.

name: Late Checkout Records
submission_requirements: Official demos page (latecheckout.info/demos) returned connection refused; email corroborated by multiple secondary sources
why: Founded 2022 by Chris Lorenzo (UK) with a clear bass house and garage-influenced identity. Active through Dec 2024: 'U Should Not Be Doing That' with Amyl & The Sniffers (Dec 2024), 'Pump' AC Slater Remix (Jul 2024). Strong Beatport presence in bass house genre. Has a dedicated /demos page (latecheckout.info/demos) that was indexed, indicating active intake. Direct crossover with US bass house scene via AC Slater collaboration; accessible to unknown artists.

name: Glitterbox Recordings
submission_requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal. Genre: soulful house, disco-influenced house, vocal house Part of the Defected LabelRadar family launched Sep 2023. Portal confirmed active. Acceptance rate ~3-5%.
why: Defected's premium soulful-house and disco sub-label; Purple Disco Machine, Mousse T., Folamour, The Shapeshifters. Officially opened submissions via LabelRadar in 2023 — the first time Defected/Glitterbox accepted cold demos. Strong Beatport, Traxsource and streaming credibility; major booking impact; scene royalty.

name: Classic Music Company
submission_requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal. Classic / deep / soulful house only LabelRadar portal confirmed in search results. Part of Defected LabelRadar umbrella.
why: Set up in 1994 by Derrick Carter and Luke Solomon — the originators of classic Chicago house — now operating as a Defected-distributed imprint. Honey Dijon, Eli Escobar, Red Rack'em, Juan Maclean. Elite scene respect, strong Beatport and booking pull, now fully open via LabelRadar.

name: Freerange Records
submission_requirements: Email with private SoundCloud link. Deep / soulful house focus Confirmed on official site freerangerecords.co.uk as the only public contact address. No dedicated demos@ address; info@ is listed for general enquiries and serves as the demo contact.
why: London-based deep house institution since 1997 — 28 years, 300+ EPs. Home to Jimpster, Detroit Swindle, Milton Jackson, Lovebirds, Manuel Tur. Beatport and Traxsource chart regular. Active as of June 2025 with new Jimpster/OVEOUS release. Premier scene credibility; genuinely reachable for unknown artists via email.

name: Delusions of Grandeur
submission_requirements: Email via general contact. Deep, underground house and disco only hi@delusionsofgrandeur.com is the general enquiries address on the official site; no separate dedicated demo email found.
why: London's premier deep-house-and-disco boutique label since 2009. Tom Roberts and Jimpster curate with extreme care; Session Victim, Gerd, Levantine. Active through 2025 (Constellation EP Jan 2025). Beatport and Traxsource presence. Warm reputation for breaking unknown artists that fit the sound.

name: Local Talk
submission_requirements: Use Bandcamp contact form or reach out via social channels. Classic / soulful deep house No public demo email or official submission page found for Local Talk. The Bandcamp page has a generic 'Contact Local Talk' form. The label's own site (thelocaltalk.se) did not surface submission details. The claimed dm method cannot be confirmed against an official source.
why: Stockholm-based deep-house label run by Mad Mats and Tooli since 2009; lauded for bringing Scandinavian deep house to global dancefloors. Active on Beatport and Traxsource with 2024-2025 releases. Both founders personally listen to every demo. Scene respect among deep house purists.

name: Dirt Crew Recordings
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only. Allow 2-3 weeks for response. Every demo is listened to Demo email confirmed via official contact page (dirtcrew.net redirects to Bandcamp) and multiple secondary sources. Selection 2024 released Dec 13 2024 confirms active status.
why: Berlin-based deep-house label since 2004, 200+ releases. Selection 2024 compilation released Dec 2024 — definitively active. Beatport and Traxsource listed. Known for working with unknown artists across genres. Published demo email and turnaround promise publicly on their website.

name: Z Records
submission_requirements: Send links — NOT MP3s. Email gordon@zrecords.ltd.uk Demo contact confirmed directly on the official Z Records website contact page. Gordon is the label manager. Dave Lee's own label so highly curated — quality bar is high.
why: Founded 1990 by Dave Lee (Joey Negro); one of the longest-running UK soul/house labels. Z Records sits at the intersection of deep house, nu-disco and soulful house — perfectly aligned. Beatport presence, regular DJ chart appearances. Open to unknown artists; demo email published publicly.

name: Razor-N-Tape
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only Labelsbase lists tapey@razor-n-tape.com as the A&R demo email. The alternative demos@razor-n-tape.com is mentioned in secondary sources but labelsbase cites tapey@ as the primary contact. Claimed email matches.
why: Brooklyn-born disco and deep house label since 2012. Known for original house, disco edits and compilations. Family Affair Vol. 4 dropped Dec 2024 — definitively active. 100+ releases, Beatport and Traxsource presence. Known to bring in fresh talent; accessible demo contact.

name: Shall Not Fade
submission_requirements: Artist name. Instagram handle. Previous label history. Private SoundCloud playlist link (as many tracks as possible). Email address. Additional info / planned releases Form confirmed active and accepting responses as of June 2026 via direct fetch. Titled 'DEMO SUBMISSION FORM 2023' but still live. Linked from official Linktree (linktr.ee/shallnotfade). Also covers sister labels Time Is Now and Lost Palms.
why: Bristol-based label launched Dec 2015. Active release schedule on Beatport and Traxsource. Runs a dedicated Google Form for demo submissions — one of the most open, artist-friendly submission systems for underground house. Covers SNF, Time Is Now, Lost Palms sub-labels. Scene respect among UK house community.

name: Wolf Music Recordings
submission_requirements: Email Matt Neale directly No dedicated demo@ address found. mattwolfmusic@gmail.com is the licensing/general contact for Matt Neale (label co-founder); this is the best public contact for demos. Contact page at wolfmusicrecords.com/contact inaccessible. Confidence low — demo channel unconfirmed from a primary source.
why: UK-based independent deep house and disco label since 2009. Active through 2025-2026 (Tom Esselle EP Feb 2026, Beatportal Hype Label of the Month). Frits Wentink, Retromigration, Harold Heath. Genuine underground credibility; Beatport and Traxsource presence. One of the most respected UK deep house boutique labels.

name: Toy Tonics
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only info@toytonics.de serves as both general contact and demo A&R email per labelsbase.net; label active with May 2026 release
why: Berlin-based independent label and culture crew since 2012. Monthly EPs on vinyl and digital. Releases Kapote, Alma Negra, Harvey Sutherland remixes. Italomania Vol. 3 (2024) and consistent 2025 releases confirm active status. Beatport, Traxsource, Kompakt distribution. Known for eclectic, funky, disco-influenced house.

name: Permanent Vacation

why: Brooklyn/NYC deep house label founded 2010 by Gadi Mizrahi (Baby Prince), off-shoot of Wolf + Lamb. Houses the Wolf + Lamb movement's funkier, deep-house-forward output, with artists like Soul Clap, Greg Paulus and Edwin Esco. Active with Bandcamp presence and Beatport catalog. Part of the Crew Love coalition. NYC deep house touchstone label.

name: Crew Love Records
submission_requirements: No public demo channel — target via affiliated labels (Soul Clap: records@soulclap.us) or DM artists on social media No standalone public demo submission channel found. Joint venture of Wolf + Lamb, Soul Clap, and Double Standard. Active releases confirmed 2026 on Beatport. Best approach: submit to Soul Clap Records first.
why: Brooklyn-based collaborative label from Wolf + Lamb, Soul Clap, and Double Standard. Active 2022-2026 on Beatport spanning deep house, house, indie dance, nu-disco. Artists: No Regular Play, PillowTalk, Nick Monaco, Life on Planets, Navid Izadi, Slow Hands. A curated, quality-first imprint that is part of the NYC deep house ecosystem. Access is through the Wolf + Lamb / Soul Clap artist network.

name: Turbo Recordings
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only demos@turborecordings.com confirmed by labelsbase.net. Turbo Recordings is an active Montreal-based label (Tiga, founded 1998) spanning house, techno, electro.
why: Montreal, Canada imprint founded 1998 by Tiga, named Beatport Label of the Month August 2024. Active through 2024-2025 with releases: Dense & Pika 'It House' (Nov 2024), Extrawelt 'Grindmaster' (Dec 2024), Kenny Glasgow (Jan 2025). A prestigious Canadian label with real industry clout across tech house, indie dance, and experimental electronic music. Confirmed public demo email.

name: Phunk Junk Records
submission_requirements: Up to 5 tracks via Label Engine form. Artist name, email, and track titles required Label Engine form confirmed live. Email sourced from labelsbase.net and official website phunkjunk.com. Active 2024-2025 releases confirmed on Beatport.
why: Chicago-based label founded 2012 by producer SALADIN. Active 2024-2025 with releases including 'Get On The Floor' (Jun 2024, Tech House) and 'Dance With Me' (Jan 2025, Bass House) on Beatport. A platform rooted in the birthplace of house music, Chicago, with open and confirmed demo submission. A real opportunity for an unknown artist to get heard by a home-grown Chicago label.

name: Rawhouse Records Chicago
submission_requirements: Contact via Bandcamp 'Contact Rawhouse Records Chicago' email link Label is active (Jeanette Thomas 'Good Vibrations' released March 2025). No public demo email or DM submission page found. Bandcamp has a generic contact link. Claimed method 'dm' and Bandcamp URL are the best available channels.
why: Chicago house label founded 2005 by Allen Wright Jr. Specializes in Chicago House, Deep House, Disco House, Nu Disco, Afro-House. Active through 2025 with confirmed releases: Jeanette Thomas 'Good Vibrations' (March 2025), MISS. TC release (July 2024). A genuine Chicago underground imprint with multiple sub-styles and Traxsource/Beatport presence. A grassroots label that can launch an unknown artist into the Chicago house scene.

name: Soul Candi Records
submission_requirements: Original unreleased material only. No remixes or bootlegs. MP3 320kbps preferred, max 20MB per file. Upload via official website form only (no SoundCloud or Dropbox links). Filename must include artist name and track title No response within 8 weeks means not proceeding. WhatsApp contact: +27 82 048 3725.
why: South Africa's longest-running dedicated house imprint (est. late 1990s), consistently releasing deep house, afro house and afro tech. Active releases confirmed through 2024 and 2025 (multiple Bandcamp releases: 'The Chronic Effect' Nov 2025, 'House Archives Vol.1' Sept 2025). Open public demo submission form on official website with clear requirements.

name: Kunye Records
submission_requirements: Afro House / Afro Tech only Primary submission channel is LabelRadar portal. General contact: info@kunyerecords.com.
why: Founded 2020 by Shimza (South Africa). Beatport Hype Label of the Month October 2024. Bridges South African emerging producers to global stages. Roster includes Thakzin, Blanka Mazimela, Darque, with remixes by Louie Vega, Mele, Rodriguez Jr. Has official LabelRadar demo portal and a general contact email.

name: Make The Girls Dance Records
submission_requirements: LabelRadar portal also available: https://www.labelradar.com/labels/makethegirlsdancerecords/portal
why: Founded 2021 by HUGEL and Juany Bravo. Ranked #2 top-selling Afro House label on Beatport in 2024. Rooted in Tribal and Afro House, Latin grooves, and club culture. Trackstack demo box URL publicly posted on Threads by label manager Juany Bravo. Also has a LabelRadar portal.

name: Dawn Patrol Records
submission_requirements: Melodic house, organic house, or melodic techno preferred. Label is NOT looking for pure afro house singles Claimed URL dawnpatrolmusic.com/contact is WRONG — that site belongs to 'Dawn Patrol Music', a US-based music licensing/supervision company (not a record label), which explicitly states it is 'not a record label' and 'not looking for afro house singles'. The actual Dawn Patrol Records is a Brazilian Afro House/Melodic House label founded in 2020 by Maz and Antdot (Beatport ID 84770, Traxsource ID 54577). No public demo submission channel for the actual label could be confirmed. URL removed.
why: Founded 2020 by Brazilian duo Maz and Antdot. Top-5 best-selling Afro House label on Beatport in 2023 and 2024. 'Povoada' reached #1 on Beatport Afro House chart. Active release 'Emoriô' in October 2024. Official contact form on website. Label explicitly states preferred genres via Instagram @dawnpatrol.music.

name: Afrocentric Records
submission_requirements: Send private streaming links (MP3). Include contact details in email body. Keep submission short, best tracks first Label is based in Dubai (UAE) but entirely dedicated to African continent artists and sounds.
why: Founded 2015 by Cory Centric, dedicated exclusively to high-quality Afro House from across the African continent. Active 2024 releases confirmed (RAWNIK 'AMAZWI', Kates Le Cafe). Demo email published directly on the label's official contact page.

name: Cafe De Anatolia
submission_requirements: Organic house / ethnic deep house / afro house / world music genres only Also contactable via demos.cafedeanatolia@gmail.com (verified via official Facebook post). LabelRadar portal is the primary channel.
why: Founded 2017, North Macedonia. #1 best-selling label and artist in Organic/Ethnic House on Beatport in 2024. Nominated IMS Ibiza Beatport Hype Label of Year 2024. 10,000+ track catalog with 5,000+ artists across 50+ sub-brands including Afro House. Massive breakout vehicle for unknown artists. LabelRadar portal and email both verified.

name: Nulu Music
submission_requirements: Afro house and afro tech only Booking: booking@nulumusic.com. Sub-label Nulu Electronic also active on Beatport.
why: Founded 2009 in New York by Anane Vega, pioneer of Afro House and Afro Tech. 'You're So Sweet' remix ranked #1 on Traxsource Afro House. Active 2024-2025 releases confirmed (Dec 2024, Nov 2024). Also runs the NULU Movement Radio Show on KayaFM (South Africa). Demo email verified on official contact page.

name: CamelMusic Records
submission_requirements: Tech house and house genres only. Submit private SoundCloud links. Include artist name and email address in the form Tally.so demo form verified live on 2026-06-01. Also reachable at camelrecordsgroup@gmail.com.
why: Founded 2012, Mendoza, Argentina. Independent Argentine underground label dedicated to house, tech house and minimal. Active 2025 release confirmed (Jan 2025 on Beatport, May 2026 on LabelsBase). Tally.so demo submission form personally verified as live and functioning.

name: Kazukuta Records
submission_requirements: Afro house only kazukutarecords@gmail.com found in footer of official label website kazukuta-records.com; active Afro-house label with recent releases
why: Founded 2011, Angola — the first electronic music label born in Angola. 266 Afro House tracks on Beatport. Active releases Dec 2024 and Jan 2025 confirmed. DJEFF has released on Spinnin' Deep and Diplo's Higher Ground, giving the label international credibility. Email published on official website kazukuta-records.com.

name: Timeless Moment
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only Brazilian melodic/progressive house label founded 2016 by Morttagua. Active with releases in 2025 (Timeless IBIZA 2025). Primary genre is melodic progressive house, adjacent to house/tech-house scope. demos@timelessmoment.com.br confirmed by labelsbase.net and search results. Official site returned 503 during fetch.
why: Founded 2016, Brazil. Premier melodic/progressive house label from Brazil with global recognition. 'Timeless 2025' compilation released in 2025. 881 Progressive House releases on Beatport. Support from Solomun, Black Coffee, Pete Tong (BBC Radio 1), Hernan Cattaneo. Demo email confirmed via LabelsBase and label website.

name: Area Verde
submission_requirements: SoundCloud secret links only. All tracks in one secret SoundCloud playlist. Maximum 5 tracks. Include text in email body (not just a link) Also has periodic Beatport Hype producer competitions via LabelRadar portal.
why: Founded 2019, Brazil (IAMT Music Group). One of 5 labels in Beatport Hype accelerator program. Active 2024-2025 with releases including 'Best Melodic & Progressive House 2024' compilation on Beatport. 213 Progressive House + 92 Melodic House & Techno releases on Beatport. Runs open producer competitions via LabelRadar. Clear public demo email with requirements.

name: Nube Music Records
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only data.nubemusic@gmail.com confirmed on labelsbase.net. Label active through 2024 (Dec 2024 pre-order found). Argentina-based progressive house label founded 2016.
why: Founded 2016, Argentina. Partners with Proton Label network. Active December 2024 release (pre-order 'Game Over' EP) confirmed on Beatport. Focuses on progressive house, deep house, and deep techno from Argentine and international artists. Demo email listed on LabelsBase.

name: Under Pressure Records South Africa
submission_requirements: Afro house and adjacent deep house only soulvarti@gmail.com is the founder/label head direct contact (Thabo Matebesi / Soul Varti). Label active — UPR Vaults Locks Unchained Vol. III released Oct 2025, Vol. 5 on Beatport. Afro House / Melodic House genre (house-adjacent).
why: Founded 2012 by Soul Varti, influential Afro House label from South Africa. Active releases confirmed through 2025 (UPR Vaults Locks Unchained Vol. III Oct 2025, 'Christina' Aug 2025). Features South African producers KingTouch, Smallistic, Deep Sen, Hypaphonik, DJ Tears PLK. Contact email cited across multiple licensing and submission reference sources.

name: Midnight Riot Records
genre_tags: nu-disco; disco; balearic; house; boogie; afro-house
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links only. Yam Who personally listens to every demo Same address used for A&R, bookings, and general contact. Hotmail address has been publicly listed on labelsbase and confirmed on the label's own site as the single demo channel.
why: London's premier nu-disco/balearic imprint, run by Yam Who? since 2012. Consistently in Traxsource top-200 and lands numerous compilations per year. Actively released throughout 2024-2025 ('The Finest 2024', 'Set Me Free', 'Balearic Headspace Vol 7'). Known for breaking unknown disco and house producers — ideal stepping stone for the slice.

name: Sol Selectas
submission_requirements: Send private SoundCloud links via SoundCloud DM only. Send only a few best tracks. Include bio/concept background. Tracks should be mastered, even basic home master. Replies only if interested — be patient No public demo email. SoundCloud DM is the sole confirmed submission channel, per Sabo interview in Progressive Astronaut and official contact page.
why: NYC-founded, LA-based organic-house powerhouse run by Sabo since 2006. Home of the 'Summer Sol' and 'Global Entry' compilation series — key tastemaker releases in the organic/tribal house scene. Active in 2025 ('Pura Sol', 'Summer Sol X'). Sabo explicitly stated he listens personally to every SoundCloud DM submission.

name: Maccabi House
submission_requirements: Primary channel: Trackstack portal at tstack.app/maccabihouse. Alternative: maccabihouse@gmail.com Trackstack portal confirmed via multiple sources. Gmail address referenced alongside Trackstack as secondary contact.
why: Tel Aviv imprint run by Adam Ten, one of the most internationally hyped melodic/psychedelic house acts of 2024-2025 (Coachella, Insomniac shows). Roster includes Luke Alessi, Rafael, and others. Active releases throughout 2024-2025 ('Like This' March 2025, 'All Stars 007' March 2025). Open Trackstack portal confirms they accept cold demos. Music played by Black Coffee, Solomun, FISHER.

name: STEREOHYPE
submission_requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal. Label also historically accepted direct email demos per Instagram post (June 2024) but email not confirmed — use LabelRadar as primary LabelRadar portal is the official confirmed channel. Instagram post C8C1gQ-MGLi teased email demos in June 2024 but exact address unconfirmed publicly. LabelRadar rated high confidence.
why: James Hype's own artist label, founded 2019. One of the most-streamed tech house acts globally. Active releases in 2024-2025 (e.g. 'Behaviour' feat. A.D.O.R. 2025, 'More Of The Same' with Tita Lau 2025). Confirmed open LabelRadar demo portal — very accessible for unknown producers seeking a high-profile tech-house co-sign.

name: Slow Life
submission_requirements: Demos only via SoundCloud DM (stated on their social media). info@slowlifemusic.org for general inquiries Multiple sources (labelsbase, RA, Bandcamp community) confirm 'demos only via SoundCloud DM'. Official website slowlifemusic.org confirms info email.
why: Berlin-based collective-label active since 2011, consistently releasing quality deep/progressive house on vinyl. Catalog now past SL041 (April 2025). Niche underground reach: distributed via Redeye, Yoyaku, Newtone. Accepts cold demos purely via SoundCloud DM — accessible entry point for unknown artists with a deep/progressive sound.

name: Phantasy Sound
submission_requirements: Email demos to above address. General/licensing inquiries: phantasyhq@gmail.com Email confirmed directly from official About Us page at shop.phantasysound.co.uk/pages/about-us. The page includes a 'click here' link resolving to this address.
why: London label run by DJ legend Erol Alkan since 2007. UK's most artistically ambitious house-adjacent imprint; roster includes Roman Flügel, Factory Floor, Tom Rowlands. Releases very active in 2024-2025 (Roman Flügel 'No Solutions EP' Nov 2024, Factory Floor PH153 Jan 2025). Official About Us page links directly to demos@phantasysound.co.uk — genuine cold-demo channel.

name: Bastard Jazz Recordings
genre_tags: disco; house; nu-disco; dub; afro; downtempo
submission_requirements: General inquiry email also used for demo submissions info@bastardjazz.com confirmed on official About page bastardjazz.com/bastard-jazz/. No dedicated demos@ address published; use info@ with clear subject line per industry standard.
why: Brooklyn-based label since 2001, now one of the most respected independent disco/house imprints in the US. 143+ nu-disco catalog entries on Beatport. Active releases throughout 2025 (Captain Planet & Tony Allen 'Tony's House' Aug 2025, Eliot Lipp EP May 2025, Peter Matson Jan 2025). Artists like Lord Echo, Robohands, Illa J. Confirmed cold-demo-friendly via general contact email. Genre overlap strong for disco/Afro/house slice.

name: FHUO Records
submission_requirements: No public demo channel. Label's own SoundCloud states 'don't write us at: forheavenuseonly@gmail.com' — they do not accept unsolicited demos. Relationship/referral only Included for CRM visibility (warm-intro target). Do NOT cold-email. The address forheavenuseonly@gmail.com is intentionally discouraged. Only approach through artist connections.
why: London imprint by Folamour — one of the most distinctive deep house artists of the era. Active 2024-2025 releases including 'Oyabun', 'Chapeau rouge', 'Ordinary Drugs', and the album 'Movement Therapy' (2025). Artists like Kimosabe, Madcat, Parviz on roster. Folamour's taste-making profile means a release here carries significant weight in the European deep house community.

name: Pinchy & Friends
submission_requirements: No public demo channel confirmed. Serendeepity distributes label (info@serendeepity.net may be a distribution contact but not a demo channel). Bandcamp contact form or warm intro recommended Label is active (releases in 2024-2025 including Alex Kassian EP August 2024). No demo submission method found on official site (pinchyandfriends.com), Bandcamp community page, or any secondary source. Claimed method was already 'unknown'.
why: LA-based vinyl-focused imprint, catalog PF001–PF021+. Releases eclectic leftfield deep house, Afro-influenced, and disco-house. Artists include Alex Kassian, Exotic Gardens, Dreems. Still actively releasing (PF020 Coyote 'Nyabinghi LP', PF021 'Afternoon Dubs' pre-order 2025). Distributed by Serendeepity and respected in the underground. No cold-demo email confirmed publicly.
